lines.gurmukhi: ਹਰਿ ਕੀਰਤਨੁ ਗਾਵਹੁ ਦਿਨੁ ਰਾਤੀ ਸਫਲ ਏਹਾ ਹੈ ਕਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: har keeratan gaavahu din raatee safal ehaa hai kaaree jeeo |3|
lines.english: So sing the Kirtan of the Lord's Praises, day and night. This is the most fruitful occupation. ||3||
is rid of the illnesses of countless lifetimes and incarnations.
Deep within each and every heart, the Supreme Lord is humbly worshipped.
Bestowing His Glance of Grace, He has adorned His slave.

lines.gurmukhi: ਇਕਸੁ ਵਿਣੁ ਹੋਰੁ ਦੂਜਾ ਨਾਹੀ ਬਾਬਾ ਨਾਨਕ ਇਹ ਮਤਿ ਸਾਰੀ ਜੀਉ ॥੪॥੩੯॥੪੬॥
lines.translit: eikas vin hor doojaa naahee baabaa naanak ih mat saaree jeeo |4|39|46|
lines.english: Without the One, there is no other at all. O Baba Nanak, this is the most excellent wisdom. ||4||39||46||
I sacrifice everything for Him.
My mind and body are imbued with love for the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਆਠ ਪਹਰ ਗੋਵਿੰਦ ਗੁਣ ਗਾਈਐ ਬਿਸਰੁ ਨ ਕੋਈ ਸਾਸਾ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: aatth pehar govind gun gaaeeai bisar na koee saasaa jeeo |1|
lines.english: Twenty-four hours a day, sing the Glorious Praises of the Lord of the Universe. Do not forget Him, for even one breath. ||1||
Maajh, Fifth Mehl:
He is a companion, a friend, and a beloved of mine,
who reflects upon the Lord's Name, in the Company of the Holy.
The Elysian Tree, the source of all blessings, is meditation on the Unseen and Unknowable Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸਾਧੂ ਸੰਗਿ ਤਰੀਜੈ ਸਾਗਰੁ ਕਟੀਐ ਜਮ ਕੀ ਫਾਸਾ ਜੀਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: saadhoo sang tareejai saagar katteeai jam kee faasaa jeeo |2|
lines.english: In the Saadh Sangat, the Company of the Holy, cross over the world-ocean, and the noose of death shall be cut away. ||2||
The four cardinal blessings are obtained by serving the Lord.

lines.gurmukhi: ਕਾਮੁ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਕਿਲਬਿਖ ਗੁਰਿ ਕਾਟੇ ਪੂਰਨ ਹੋਈ ਆਸਾ ਜੀਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: kaam krodh kilabikh gur kaatte pooran hoee aasaa jeeo |3|
lines.english: The Guru has cut out the sinful mistakes of sexual desire and anger, and my hopes have been fulfilled. ||3||
That mortal who is blessed by perfect destiny meets the Lord,
The Sustainer of the Universe, in the Company of the Holy.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਵਸਿਆ ਜਿਸੁ ਅੰਤਰਿ ਪਰਵਾਣੁ ਗਿਰਸਤ ਉਦਾਸਾ ਜੀਉ ॥੪॥੪੦॥੪੭॥
lines.translit: naanak naam vasiaa jis antar paravaan girasat udaasaa jeeo |4|40|47|
lines.english: O Nanak, if the Naam, the Name of the Lord, dwells within the mind, one is approved and accepted, whether he is a house-holder or a renunciate. ||4||40||47||
Maajh, Fifth Mehl:
Meditating on the Naam, the Name of the Lord, my heart is filled with peace.
By His Grace, His devotees become famous and acclaimed.

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਾ ਕੈ ਗ੍ਰਿਹਿ ਨਵ ਨਿਧਿ ਹਰਿ ਭਾਈ ॥
lines.translit: jaa kai grihi nav nidh har bhaaee |
lines.english: O Siblings of Destiny, the nine treasures are found in the Home of the Lord;

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੰਤਸੰਗਿ ਮਿਲਿ ਹਰਿ ਹਰਿ ਜਪਿਆ ਬਿਨਸੇ ਆਲਸ ਰੋਗਾ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: santasang mil har har japiaa binase aalas rogaa jeeo |1|
lines.english: Joining the Society of the Saints, I chant the Name of the Lord, Har, Har; the disease of laziness has disappeared. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਗਿਆਨ ਧਿਆਨ ਪੂਰਨ ਪਰਮੇਸੁਰ ਪ੍ਰਭੁ ਸਭਨਾ ਗਲਾ ਜੋਗਾ ਜੀਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: giaan dhiaan pooran paramesur prabh sabhanaa galaa jogaa jeeo |2|
lines.english: The Perfect Transcendent Lord is spiritual wisdom and meditation. God is All-powerful to do all things. ||2||
He comes to meet those who deserve it by their past actions.
He Himself is the One, and He Himself is the Many.

lines.gurmukhi: ਲੇਪੁ ਨਹੀ ਜਗਜੀਵਨ ਦਾਤੇ ਦਰਸਨ ਡਿਠੇ ਲਹਨਿ ਵਿਜੋਗਾ ਜੀਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: lep nahee jagajeevan daate darasan dditthe lehan vijogaa jeeo |3|
lines.english: Filth does not stick to the Giver, the Life of the World. Gazing upon the Blessed Vision of His Darshan, the pain of separation departs. ||3||
In an instant, He establishes and disestablishes.
Holding on to the hem of His Robe, the entire Universe is saved.
He Himself causes His Name to be chanted.

lines.gurmukhi: ਗੁਰ ਬੋਹਿਥੁ ਪਾਇਆ ਕਿਰਪਾ ਤੇ ਨਾਨਕ ਧੁਰਿ ਸੰਜੋਗਾ ਜੀਉ ॥੪॥੪੧॥੪੮॥
lines.translit: gur bohith paaeaa kirapaa te naanak dhur sanjogaa jeeo |4|41|48|
lines.english: The Boat of the Guru is found by His Grace; O Nanak, such blessed destiny is pre-ordained. ||4||41||48||
Maajh, Fifth Mehl:
People do whatever the Lord inspires them to do.
Wherever He keeps us is a good place.

lines.gurmukhi: ਸੋਈ ਸਿਆਣਾ ਸੋ ਪਤਿਵੰਤਾ ਹੁਕਮੁ ਲਗੈ ਜਿਸੁ ਮੀਠਾ ਜੀਉ ॥੧॥
lines.translit: soee siaanaa so pativantaa hukam lagai jis meetthaa jeeo |1|
lines.english: That person is clever and honorable, unto whom the Hukam of the Lord's Command seems sweet. ||1||

lines.gurmukhi: ਜਿਸੁ ਲਾਇ ਲਏ ਸੋ ਚਰਣੀ ਲਾਗੈ ॥
lines.translit: jis laae le so charanee laagai |
lines.english: Those whom the Lord attaches, are attached to His Feet.

lines.gurmukhi: ਊਂਧ ਕਵਲੁ ਜਿਸੁ ਹੋਇ ਪ੍ਰਗਾਸਾ ਤਿਨਿ ਸਰਬ ਨਿਰੰਜਨੁ ਡੀਠਾ ਜੀਉ ॥੨॥
lines.translit: aoondh kaval jis hoe pragaasaa tin sarab niranjan ddeetthaa jeeo |2|
lines.english: Those, whose inverted lotus of the crown chakra is illuminated, see the Immaculate Lord everywhere. ||2||
Everything is strung upon the One String of the Lord.
You Yourself recognize Your Own Self.
Only You Yourself know Your Glory.
You have no hatred or vengeance; Your Saints are immaculate and pure.

lines.gurmukhi: ਹਉ ਬਲਿਹਾਰੀ ਸੰਤਨ ਤੇਰੇ ਜਿਨਿ ਕਾਮੁ ਕ੍ਰੋਧੁ ਲੋਭੁ ਪੀਠਾ ਜੀਉ ॥੩॥
lines.translit: hau balihaaree santan tere jin kaam krodh lobh peetthaa jeeo |3|
lines.english: I am a sacrifice to Your Saints, who have crushed their sexual desire, anger and greed. ||3||
Seeing them, all sins depart.

lines.gurmukhi: ਨਾਨਕ ਨਾਮੁ ਧਿਆਇ ਧਿਆਇ ਜੀਵੈ ਬਿਨਸਿਆ ਭ੍ਰਮੁ ਭਉ ਧੀਠਾ ਜੀਉ ॥੪॥੪੨॥੪੯॥
lines.translit: naanak naam dhiaae dhiaae jeevai binasiaa bhram bhau dheetthaa jeeo |4|42|49|
lines.english: Nanak lives by meditating, meditating on the Naam. His stubborn doubt and fear have departed. ||4||42||49||
